en_title: Hasbro's The Legend of Zelda Figures Have Been Revealed, and They Look Amazing | Comic Con 2026
cn_title: 孩之宝《塞尔达传说》首批可动人偶亮相
subtitle: 林克、塞尔达与盖侬多夫

paragraphs.en: Hasbro recently blew Nintendo fans' minds with the announcement that they've acquired the license for The Legend of Zelda games , opening the door to new figures of Link, Princess Zelda, and the rest of the gang. Thankfully, they aren't making us wait long to see the first fruits of that new partnership. Hasbro is unveiling the first three The Legend of Zelda: Heroes of Hyrule figures at Comic-Con, and IGN can exclusively debut images of the whole set.
paragraphs.cn: 孩之宝最近宣布获得《塞尔达传说》游戏授权，让任天堂粉丝大为震撼，这也为林克、塞尔达公主等角色推出新款人偶打开了大门。好在大家不用等太久就能看到这次合作的首批成果。孩之宝将在动漫展公开首批三款《塞尔达传说：海拉鲁英雄》人偶，IGN则独家首发整套产品图片。

paragraphs.en: Check out the slideshow gallery below to see Hasbro's first figures of Link, Zelda, and Ganondorf:
paragraphs.cn: 查看下方幻灯片图库，即可看到孩之宝首批林克、塞尔达和盖侬多夫人偶：

paragraphs.en: It's important to note that all three figures are based on the games rather than the upcoming live-action movie. Specifically, this set draws inspiration from 2017's The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild and its sequel.
paragraphs.cn: 需要注意的是，这三款人偶全部以游戏为原型，而非即将上映的真人电影。具体来说，这套产品的灵感来自2017年的《塞尔达传说：旷野之息》及其续作。

paragraphs.en: Similar to other Hasbro lines like Star Wars: The Black Series and G.I. Joe Classified, The Heroes of Hyrule series is designed at a 6-inch scale, meaning Link and Zelda measure 6 inches tall and Ganondorf clocks in at 7.5 inches tall. All three feature extensive articulation and come with various accessories (like Ganondorf's Gloom Sword, scabbard, and interchangeable right hand, Zelda's Decayed Master Sword and interchangeable right hand, and Link's Hylian shield, interchangeable Zonai power hand, and the Master Sword).
paragraphs.cn: 与孩之宝旗下《星球大战：黑色系列》和《特种部队：机密》等产品线类似，《海拉鲁英雄》系列采用6英寸比例设计，林克与塞尔达高6英寸（约15.24厘米），盖侬多夫高7.5英寸（约19.05厘米）。三款均拥有丰富可动关节，并附带多种配件，例如盖侬多夫的瘴气之剑、剑鞘与可替换右手，塞尔达的腐朽大师之剑与可替换右手，以及林克的海利亚盾、可替换左纳乌能力手臂和大师之剑。

paragraphs.en: The Link and Zelda figures are priced at $27.99 each, while Gandorf is priced at $42.99. All three are slated for release in Spring 2027. Preorders for all three figures will open on July 22 at 5pm PT. You can find preorder links below:
paragraphs.cn: 林克与塞尔达人偶单价均为27.99美元(约合人民币190元)，盖侬多夫售价42.99美元(约合人民币291元)。三款产品计划于2027年春季发售，并将于7月22日下午5点（太平洋时间）开放预购。预购链接见下方：

paragraphs.en: Early prototypes of all three figures will be on display at Hasbro's Comic-Con booth. Stay tuned to IGN for more coverage of those and many other announcements out of SDCC 2026. You can check out the full SDCC 2026 schedule here .
paragraphs.cn: 三款人偶的早期原型都会在孩之宝动漫展展位展出。请继续关注IGN，了解这些产品以及2026年圣迭戈动漫展更多公告。你也可以在此查看2026年圣迭戈动漫展完整日程。

summary: 孩之宝公开《塞尔达传说：海拉鲁英雄》首批三款人偶，包括林克、塞尔达公主和盖侬多夫。产品以《旷野之息》及其续作为原型，预计2027年春季上市。
opus_summary: 孩之宝获得《塞尔达传说》授权后公布首批6英寸人偶，角色为林克、塞尔达与盖侬多夫，配备丰富关节和武器配件。三款产品2027年春季发售。
